goal: Screen 25 Session-1 rows; produce evidence triples or stop conditions per row
expected_output: ~25 HTML+PNG+Wayback+quote sets OR documented stop reasons; Session-1 row_status CSV
why_it_moves_main_goal: Adds 12-15 new bridge-input candidates to the funnel
what_not_to_do: No active runtime change; no staged data change; no FREIDA/ACGME scraping
stop_condition: If yield drops below 8/25 stop and diagnose

goal: Curator review of Session-1 results; classify each row into bridge-ready / partial / needs-hardening / keep-internal / wrong-lane
expected_output: Session-1 curator decision CSV; bridge-input DRAFT for accepted rows
why_it_moves_main_goal: Filters Session-1 down to actionable rows; same shape as Promotion-Batch-3 curator pass
what_not_to_do: No public copy expansion; no caveat removal; no broad-IMG without source
stop_condition: If curator rejects more than 50% diagnose source rules

goal: Promote Session-1 DRAFT to VALIDATED_BRIDGE_INPUT — Wayback save retries + per-site source resolution + verbatim quote landing
why_it_moves_main_goal: Same as Batch-3 evidence-hardening sprint; this is the bottleneck step
what_not_to_do: No new evidence capture beyond hardening; no random rows; no PNG with embedded keys

goal: Build staged batch 4 data file from VALIDATED_BRIDGE_INPUT
what_not_to_do: Mirrors batch-3 staging; NOT imported by app
success_metric: No active runtime change; no app import; data-only

goal: Map new staged batch 4 rows for /contact / correction intake
expected_output: Listing map + evidence join map + correction payload map for new rows
what_not_to_do: No /contact UI change; no endpoint change

goal: Audit new staged batch 4; pick 1-3 safest noindex activation candidates
Activate 1-3 audit-shortlisted rows into noindex pilot
expected_output: Active count grows from 10 to 11-13; rollback plan; browser QA
why_it_moves_main_goal: Real product growth — same shape as Slices 1+2
what_not_to_do: No production deploy; no public launch; trivially reversible
success_metric: Active count grows; browser QA PASS; zero console errors

goal: Screen the next 25 Session-2 rows from the 100-row Queue 4
Strategic checkpoint after Session 2 — decide Session 3 vs production-ready slice vs other lane
expected_output: Decision doc + scoreboard delta + 10-sprint plan v2
why_it_moves_main_goal: Avoids endless screening if active runtime is "enough"; opens door to production-ready discussion if 20+ active and stable
what_not_to_do: No premature production push; no homepage exposure
success_metric: Cleared decision; either continue with Session 3 or pivot
